phase: P0.5 ADMIN UX + ROLE MANAGEMENT + EMAIL RESET DELIVERY

adminNavProof.detail: Authenticated navbar now renders admin links (users, connectors, observability, runtime, deployment, audit) only when isAdmin=true.

pilotAdminUiProof.detail: verify:admin-ux-email confirms /auth/me ADMIN for pilot and admin routes/navigation are present.

ayhanAdminUiProof.detail: Role visibility for ayhan is now governed by /admin/users role management and normalized admin gate logic (case-insensitive).

mahirUserIsolationProof.detail: AdminOnly + RoleGate + backend admin middleware continue to block non-admin access; verify:rbac remains 57/57 PASS.

adminUserManagementProof.detail: Admin users page supports listing users, selecting USER/ADMIN, and saving via PATCH /admin/users/:id/role with audit-safe status messaging.

roleUpdateEndpointProof.detail: PATCH /admin/users/:id/role added with ADMIN-only protection, last-admin guard, self-demotion guard, and audit logging.

logoutNavbarProof.detail: Top-right authenticated navbar now shows user identity, role badge, and Logout button clearing auth then redirecting to /login.

forgotPasswordEmailDeliveryProof.detail: Password reset email service sends real SMTP email when configured and does not fake delivery states. Subject updated to 'ParselRadar wachtwoord resetten'.

emailNotConfiguredProof.detail: Explicit EMAIL_NOT_CONFIGURED state is implemented in passwordResetEmailService and exposed through admin-only GET /admin/email-delivery-state endpoint.

rbacProof.detail: verify:rbac => 57/57 PASS; admin middleware still enforces non-admin denial.

sessionPersistenceProof.detail: verify:session-persistence => 16/16 PASS; hard refresh persistence behavior preserved.
